meaning: vi.切齿,格格地咬牙,咬响牙齿
examples: On the diet I would chomp my way through breakfast, even though I'm never hungry in the morning.
They just chomp on the tundra, nap a few hours and feast again.
The rest of the series involves adding value to the Chomp application.
Such black holes regularly chomp up stars, and that produces a lot of radiation.
That is barely a quarter as much as Belarusians, the world's champion potato-eaters, manage to chomp through.
